caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark gray background. She wears a light green, short-sleeved top featuring floral embroidery and a patterned neckline, along with a dark necklace. A small clip-on microphone is attached to the center of her shirt. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a circular logo is visible next to the text "NPTEL". Throughout the sequence, the woman is speaking and gesturing with her hands held up in front of her chest. Her facial expressions shift slightly as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing, and her gaze occasionally shifting downward. While her posture remains relatively constant, her hand movements and mouth positions vary across the frames, indicating an active conversation or lecture.
